channel.title: Can only see page content after refreshing the page
channel.description:
HI, I am new to Frontity and following the tutorial to create a new theme. Until this step everything went fine(https://tutorial.frontity.org/part3-displaying-posts/display-the-post-content).
While adding the code to show page content by placing this (const post = state.source[data.type][data.id]) I need to refresh the page for it to load the content, same when i click on back browser button. It is just showing a white blank page.
Console gives the attached error.! [Screen Shot 2022-02-11 at 9.59.33 pm|690x145](upload://A76WcNzSKhGKdkz5k6qg873kBbB.png)

item.title: Can only see page content after refreshing the page
item.dc:creator: Sunny
item.description:
HI, I am new to Frontity and following the tutorial to create a new theme. Until this step everything went fine(Display the post content - Frontity Tutorial).

While adding the code to show page content by placing this (const post = state.source[data.type][data.id]) I need to refresh the page for it to load the content, same when i click on back browser button. It is just showing a white blank page.

Console gives the attached error.! Screen Shot 2022-02-11 at 9.59.33 pm|690x145

Read full topic
item.source: Can only see page content after refreshing the page
